topics.label: Installation
topics.description: Install Roc. Roc aims to be a friendly functional language that compiles to fast native code.

topics.label: Types & Values
topics.description: Str, U64, I64, F64, Bool, List, Dict. Strong static typing with inference.

topics.label: Functions & Pipes
topics.description: Named functions and |> pipe operator. Functions are pure.

topics.label: Tags & Pattern Matching
topics.description: Tag unions (like enums with data) and when...is for matching.

topics.label: Records
topics.description: Structural records with type inference. No classes or inheritance.

topics.label: Effects & Platforms
topics.description: IO happens through platforms. Roc separates pure logic from effects.

topics.label: Error Handling
topics.description: Result and tag unions for errors. No exceptions.

topics.label: Testing
topics.description: expect keyword for inline tests. Built into the language.
